name: Fluent
description: Fluent skills, managed auth, and MCP setup guidance for meals, health, and style.

baseUrl.description: Default Fluent base URL override for plugin-managed auth and MCP setup.

defaultProfile.description: Default Fluent auth profile name for OpenClaw CLI flows.

defaultTrack.description: Default Fluent deployment track for OpenClaw CLI flows.

warnBeforeExpiryMinutes.description: Warn before token expiry when Fluent auth has less than this many minutes remaining.
